articles.title: Company laid off techie with just 12 minutes farewell. A week later, they made a shocking discovery: ‘Nobody even knew...’
articles.description: A company laid off a senior engineer to save money. This engineer was the only one fixing critical system problems every night. After his departure, the payment service began to fail. Investigations revealed the engineer's hidden work. The incident highlights the risks of relying on a single individual for essential operations.

articles.title: Karnataka cabinet: What challenges await Shivakumar after succeeding Siddaramaiah?
articles.description: DK Shivakumar succeeds Siddaramaiah as Karnataka CM, facing cabinet balancing, welfare funding and major infrastructure challenges.

articles.title: RBI MPC Meeting 2026 Date and Time: When will Governor Sanjay Malhotra announce policy decision? Here's how to watch live streaming
articles.description: RBI MPC Meeting June 2026: All eyes are on the Reserve Bank of India today as Governor Sanjay Malhotra announces the Monetary Policy Committee's decision. This crucial announcement will reveal the central bank's stance on interest rates and inflation. Investors are keenly awaiting signals on economic growth and stability amidst global uncertainties. The outcome will guide market sentiment for the coming months.

articles.title: Nancy Guthrie update: Annie Guthrie's old video resurfaces amid kidnapping case; ‘where do I go from here...’
articles.description: Amid the ongoing search for Nancy Guthrie, a video of her daughter Annie Guthrie has resurfaced even as she's been subjected to public speculations.

articles.description: Parth is injured defending Vaishnavi, with Rio intervening to save him. Meanwhile, Tulsi plans to pass on responsibilities, ultimately giving household keys to Nandini, upsetting Damini. Tulsi assures Damini about her son Nakul's future, promising equal rights and personal care for his education and welfare.

articles.title: Mallikarjun Kharge among 7 Congress nominees for Rajya Sabha polls
articles.description: The Congress party has announced seven candidates for the upcoming Rajya Sabha elections. Party chief Mallikarjun Kharge will contest from Karnataka, alongside Mansoor Ali Khan and Pawan Khera. Other nominations include Pranav Jha from Jharkhand, Praveen Chakravarty from Tamil Nadu, Meenakshi Natarajan from MP, and Neeraj Dangi from Rajasthan.

articles.title: Broken lock, missed calls: DU professor found dead in east Delhi home; murder probe on
articles.description: The body has been sent to Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital for post-mortem. Officials said the exact cause of death will be confirmed after the autopsy report.

articles.description: Donald Trump also referred to past trade imbalances, alleging that India had imposed high tariffs on American goods.

articles.title: India, UK launch initiatives for minerals, maritime cooperation
articles.description: India and the UK have launched a Critical Minerals Global Supply Chain Observatory and signed an MoU for a Regional Maritime Security Centre of Excellence during UK Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper's visit. The two nations also reviewed progress in trade, technology, and defense, aiming to strengthen their future-oriented partnership.

articles.title: Did this L&T-backed AI stock actually crash 90% in one day? Here's all you need to know
articles.description: E2E Networks appeared to plunge nearly 90% in a day after its 1:10 stock split took effect, but the move was purely a price adjustment. The AI-focused cloud computing company actually hit the 5% upper circuit post-split. Backed by L&T, the stock has surged over 127% in 2026 so far.

articles.title: Vedanta demerger: How will the mega restructuring impact dividend payouts for shareholders?
articles.description: Vedanta has completed a major demerger, splitting into four new companies. Investors are now assessing how this restructuring will affect the company's tradition of consistent dividend payouts. While Vedanta is expected to remain a dividend-paying entity, the absolute dividend per share may decrease. Shareholders will need to evaluate each demerged company individually for their income requirements and potential returns.

articles.title: Hauz Rani fire: ‘Shrutika was on a call with us’
articles.description: Shrutika Baranwal, a dedicated student in water governance, tragically died in a fire. She had completed her postgraduation and was set to start a new job.

articles.title: PM Modi good friend, India and US will get to trade deal, says Trump
articles.description: Responding to a question on the trade deal being negotiated between the two countries, Trump said India had taken advantage of US policies for years and charged tremendous tariffs.

articles.title: Gurugram: Man arrested for killing brother after dispute
articles.description: 23-year-old man arrested for allegedly murdering elder brother in Daulatabad village. Victim found dead with head injuries; suspect confesses to crime.

articles.title: Karnataka: Three of family killed in car accident
articles.description: Police said Gangeshwar Reddy (68), his wife Indiramma (63) and daughter Soumya (39) died on the spot.

articles.title: The hidden shortage threatening the AI boom - how to prepare for what comes next
articles.description: AI data center power shortage: The AI boom's next frontier is electricity, shifting focus from models and GPUs to the immense power needed for data centers. As AI demand surges, reliable and affordable energy is becoming a critical constraint, forcing companies to rethink infrastructure and secure long-term power contracts. This energy challenge is reshaping AI strategy and deployment.

articles.title: Karnataka CM DK Shivakumar Allocates Portfolios To Newly Sworn-in Cabinet, Keeps Finance

articles.title: Mamata Banerjee | মমতার বিরুদ্ধে Lalbazar এ অভিযোগ Chandrachur Goswami র | Bangla News
articles.description: Mamata Banerjee | মমতার বিরুদ্ধে লালবাজারে অভিযোগ। উস্কানিমূলক মন্তব্যের অভিযোগ নালিশ। সাইবার সেলে অভিযোগ চন্দ্রচূড় গোস্বামী। অখিল ভারতীয় হিন্দু মহাসভার রাজ্য সভাপতি চন্দ্রচূড়।A complaint has been lodged against Mamata at Lalbazar. The complaint alleges the making of provocative remarks. Chandrachur Goswami filed the complaint with the Cyber ​​Cell. Chandrachur serves as the State President of the Akhil Bharatiya Hindu Mahasabha.

articles.title: Chinese proverb of the day: 'It is easier to know how to do a thing than to...' - inspiring life lessons on turning knowledge into results, overcoming procrastination to take action, discipline, effort and insights on why many people struggle to reach their goals
articles.description: Chinese proverb of the day: Understanding what to do is easier than actually doing it. This ancient Chinese wisdom highlights the gap between knowledge and action. Many people know how to improve their lives but struggle with execution. Consistent effort and discipline are key to turning knowledge into results.

articles.title: 'No resignation, no new party': Tamil Nadu BJP chief dismisses Annamalai exit buzz
articles.description: Tamil Nadu BJP president Nainar Nagenthran has dismissed rumors of K Annamalai's resignation or plans to launch a new political outfit, stating there are no differences between them. This clarification follows intense speculation after Annamalai's meeting with Union Home Minister Amit Shah, fueled by reported disagreements over alliance strategies and Annamalai's desire to build the BJP as an independent force.

articles.title: White Paper reflects UDF government’s neo-liberal approach, alleges Rajeeve
articles.description: Rajeeve criticizes UDF's White Paper for prioritizing profit over public services and lacking a vision for Kerala's public sector.

articles.description: A White House official said Trump still prefers a diplomatic solution to Iran's nuclear programme

articles.title: Allergies unseen: when everyday triggers become medical emergencies
articles.description: Explore the hidden dangers of allergies, their unpredictable triggers, and the urgent need for awareness and research in India.

articles.title: Venus and Jupiter conjunction this June: Dates when Mercury will also be visible and all about this rare three-planet parade
articles.description: Skywatchers are in for a treat as Venus and Jupiter align closely on June 9, appearing almost side-by-side in the western sky after sunset. This celestial spectacle, visible to the naked eye, will also feature Mercury from June 11, creating a rare three-planet parade in the constellation Gemini. Binoculars will enhance the view of this stunning astronomical event.

articles.title: Why Vijay-starrer GOAT’s producer Archana Kalpathi refuses to work with Trisha
articles.description: In a recent interview, Archana Kalpathi, CEO of AGS Entertainment, the production house behind Vijay's films like Bigil and The Greatest of All Time (GOAT), spoke about her friendship with Trisha.

articles.title: Marjane Satrapi death: Persepolis author who chronicled life during & after Iran's revolution dies at 56; Family says she passed away 'of sadness'
articles.description: Marjane Satrapi death reason: Marjane Satrapi, the acclaimed author of Persepolis, has passed away in Paris at the age of 56. Her work brought Iranian experiences to a global audience. Satrapi was a strong advocate for freedom and women's rights. Her death follows the passing of her husband.

articles.title: Kuku targets $360M IPO at $1.8B valuation; and Dhan wants to Groww the Gen Z investor pie and TCS among 6 firms picked for Govt AI projects | MC Tech3
articles.description: In today’s Tech3 from Moneycontrol, digital entertainment startup Kuku Technologies confidentially files for an IPO targeting a valuation of nearly $1.8 billion as microdramas and AI-led content creation fuel growth. We also look at Dhan’s new investing app Millions and its push to attract Gen Z investors, the government’s first empanelled list of AI vendors for public-sector projects, and Bengaluru-based quick commerce startup FirstClub raising $55 million to fund expansion. From IPOs and investing apps to AI policy and fresh funding, here are the biggest startup and tech stories of the day.

articles.title: 15 Birthday Cakes on Road Divider: Hyderabad's Bizarre Celebration Trend Goes Viral (WATCH)
articles.description: A viral video showed multiple birthday celebrations unfolding on the divider of Hyderabad's Khajaguda Lake Road. The clip amused many online, while others raised concerns about safety, civic sense and litter.

articles.title: ‘Everything Is Manageable In Delhi’: Hotel Owner Admits Norm Violations, Explains Fire NOC Loophole
articles.description: In Malviya Nagar hotel fire case, owner Lovkesh Bajaj admits structural changes, cites loophole in fire NOC rule.

articles.title: Amit Shah chairs NEC’s 73rd Plenary Session in Shillong; 8 missions for 8 Northeast states launched
articles.description: Home Minister Amit Shah chairs the 73rd Plenary Session of the North Eastern Council (NEC) in Shillong, bringing together Governors and Chief Ministers of all eight Northeastern states to discuss development priorities for the region. The meeting focuses on connectivity, infrastructure, investment, regional integration and sustainable growth. Union Minister Jyotiraditya Scindia unveiled the 'Ashtalakshmi' vision, launching eight state-specific missions aimed at promoting the Northeast's unique strengths.Hashtags#NortheastIndia #AmitShah #NEC #Shillong #Ashtalakshmi #JyotiradityaScindia #DoNER #NortheastDevelopment #Infrastructure #Connectivity #EconomicGrowth #MugaSilk #LakadongTurmeric #NagaCoffee #BreakingNews #himantabiswasarma #assam #manipur #meghalya #jyotiradityascindia

articles.title: What is Dreambeans, Google’s new AI app to help users stop doomscrolling?
articles.description: The app has been built to help users reduce doomscrolling, which is why it only shows around 10 to 14 personalised stories every day.

articles.title: Hazira: Why the tank plant PM Modi will visit on Friday matters
articles.description: Prime Minister Modi's upcoming visit to L&T's Hazira plant highlights its growing significance in India's defence manufacturing. The facility, a hub for heavy engineering, has produced the K-9 Vajra artillery guns, with more on order, and the innovative Zorawar light tank. L&T is also developing a Futuristic Infantry Combat Vehicle, positioning Hazira as a key defence production centre.

articles.title: Employer Rejects Resignation Of Employee With Ill Son, His Reply Goes Viral
articles.description: The employer also asked if he could work from home, to which the accountant refused, saying that his son "needs me more than anything else".

articles.title: Neutral R R Kabel; target of Rs 2020: Motilal Oswal
articles.description: Motilal Oswal recommended Neutral rating on R R Kabel with a target price of Rs 2020 in its research report dated June 03, 2026.

articles.title: Will RBI hike rates or keep them unchanged? How Indian markets may react
articles.description: RBI policy decision is due on Friday. Economists expect rates to stay unchanged, but markets are also pricing a possible rate hike in India, as per reports.
